$comment: ⚠️ DEPRECATED: This Devbox configuration is deprecated in favor of Pure Nix (flake.nix). Please use 'nix develop' or direnv instead. See docs/guides/NIX_SETUP.md for the recommended setup. This file is kept for backward compatibility only and may be removed in a future release. Migration guide: docs/guides/ENVIRONMENT_COMPARISON.md

init_hook: echo '  devbox run dev    - Start development servers'
echo '  devbox run setup  - Install deps and init database'
echo '  devbox run test   - Run tests'
echo '  pnpm <command>    - Run any pnpm command'
